case_title: SAN FCO RECREATION AND PARKS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION vs. NEWTON, ROSIE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FCO RECREATION AND PARKS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT NEWTON, ROSIE SUMMONS ISSUED
ALL FURTHER PROCESS TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
